response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum 15 years of engineering experience and holds a BS in Computer Science. He possesses strong entrepreneurial experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies at top-tier companies like Google and Meta. However, he lacks the preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field and does not demonstrate the deep, recognized AI expertise or Director-level strategic consulting experience expected for a Principal AI Strategy role.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience.
Recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at Google.
Strong entrepreneurial background with experience founding platforms and leading technical workshops.
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field.
Most of his career focuses on general software/web development rather than specialized AI strategy.
Has not yet operated at a Director-level capacity for strategic AI enterprise consulting.
